role_summary: Analyze business data, prepare dashboards, and communicate insights to support operational and strategic decision-making.
main_responsibilities: Clean, transform, and analyze structured datasets; Build dashboards and recurring reports; Identify trends and communicate findings to stakeholders; Support data quality and documentation practices
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in data analytics, statistics, computer science, business, or a related field; Experience with spreadsheet analysis and SQL; Ability to communicate analytical findings clearly
required_skills: SQL; Excel; Data visualization; Statistical analysis; Communication
preferred_skills: Python; Power BI; Tableau; A/B testing
evaluation_criteria: Relevant analytical experience (30%); Technical skills match (30%); Education and certifications (20%); Communication and problem-solving evidence (20%)

role_summary: Develop, test, and maintain software applications while collaborating with cross-functional teams.
main_responsibilities: Implement application features; Write maintainable and tested code; Debug software issues; Collaborate with product and engineering teams
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in computer science, software engineering, or equivalent experience; Experience with at least one general-purpose programming language; Understanding of software development practices
required_skills: Programming; Debugging; Version control; Testing; Problem solving
evaluation_criteria: Relevant software development experience (35%); Technical skills match (35%); Education and training (15%); Collaboration and problem-solving evidence (15%)

role_summary: Plan and execute marketing campaigns, analyze campaign performance, and support brand communication activities.
main_responsibilities: Develop campaign materials; Monitor campaign performance metrics; Support content creation across digital channels; Coordinate with sales and design teams
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, business, or a related field; Experience with digital marketing channels; Strong written communication skills
required_skills: Digital marketing; Campaign analysis; Content writing; Communication; Project coordination
preferred_skills: SEO; Google Analytics; Social media management; Email marketing
evaluation_criteria: Relevant marketing experience (30%); Campaign and analytics skills (30%); Education and certifications (20%); Communication and creativity evidence (20%)

role_summary: Support recruitment, onboarding, employee records, and HR operations in a structured and compliant manner.
main_responsibilities: Coordinate interview scheduling and candidate communication; Maintain employee records; Support onboarding processes; Assist with HR reporting and policy documentation
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in human resources, psychology, business, or a related field; Knowledge of HR processes; Strong organizational and communication skills
required_skills: HR administration; Recruitment coordination; Communication; Organization; Confidentiality
preferred_skills: Applicant tracking systems; HR analytics; Employment law awareness; Onboarding tools
evaluation_criteria: Relevant HR or administrative experience (30%); HR process and tool knowledge (25%); Education and training (20%); Communication, organization, and confidentiality evidence (25%)

role_summary: Coordinate project planning, execution, stakeholder communication, and risk management across teams.
main_responsibilities: Create and maintain project plans; Track deliverables, risks, and timelines; Coordinate cross-functional stakeholders; Report project progress and blockers
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in business, management, engineering, or a related field; Experience coordinating projects or teams; Strong communication and planning skills
required_skills: Project planning; Stakeholder management; Risk tracking; Communication; Organization
preferred_skills: Agile methods; Jira; MS Project; Process improvement
evaluation_criteria: Relevant project coordination experience (35%); Planning and stakeholder management skills (30%); Education and certifications (15%); Communication and problem-solving evidence (20%)
